title: Your 401k Loan Gets Taxed Twice — $152K Gone
hook: One in four people with a 401k has taken a loan from it — and almost none of them know the IRS double-taxes that money.
angle: The combination of double taxation plus lost compounding makes 401k loans far more expensive than anyone warns you at signing
audience: Workers in their 30s-40s who have retirement savings and have considered or taken a 401k loan
key_numbers: 1 in 4 401k holders has taken a loan
$20,000 loan loses $152,000 in compounding over 30 years at 7%
Loan repayments are taxed twice — once to repay, once at withdrawal
Lose your job? Entire balance due immediately or 10% penalty plus income tax
